content.en:
Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian came to find the Void Immortal Realm and explained his intention.

The Void Immortal Realm was very surprised, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, your body in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth has become the Ultimate Lord? In other words, you have created your own Ultimate Dimension Killing Move?"

"Yes!"

The aura on Ye Tian's body diffused out, and the ultimate body that was transforming was undoubtedly revealed.

Seeing this, the Void Immortal Realm naturally no longer doubted.

"I didn't expect you to descend to the gods to conquer the heavens and the earth once, and you successfully mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move!"

She has descended more than 70,000 times, I don't know how many times she has been in danger, how many times she has died, and even several times she was almost killed by a strong man who has mastered the ultimate dimension killing move.

And Ye Tian, who only descended once, and didn't practice for too long, mastered the ultimate dimensional killing move, is this the gap in talent?

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you need to be careful, there are many Ultimate Masters who have mastered the Ultimate Dimension Killing Moves, some of them are much stronger than me, and there is even an existence that is extremely close to the Ultimate Realm Lord. You have to be fast to snatch the treasures of the gods and the world, and you have to escape from the ultimate masters. The Void Immortal Realm Lord reminded.

"I know, so I hope that the Void Heaven Palace will send me to the vicinity of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, but I can only take you to a nearby location, and I can't pick you up, so you can only return on your own. The Void Immortal Realm Lord reminded.

"Thank you Void Immortal Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian thanked.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

The Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth floated like a huge bubble on the sea of dimensions.

And just around here, the void of the Sea of Dimensions distorted, and a figure appeared here.

This figure is Ye Tian.

It was also his first time entering the Sea of Dimensions.

As soon as he entered the Dimension Sea, he felt the terrifying oppression of the Dimension Sea and the majesty of countless energies.

He checked the directions, and then went to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth not far away.

"It's time to act.!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Divine dimension heaven and earth, divine dimension domain.

Ye Tian, Yang Wu's body, went directly to the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, he didn't have time to capture all the twelve Heavenly Sects, and it was definitely too late in time.

Therefore, his target is the power of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect.

Wow!

He used the Heavenly Extreme Killing Move, quickly descended on the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and then directly killed it.

"Tianwei killing move, break!"

Under a single blow, the defense formed by the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect using a special object was broken by a single blow.

Whew!!!

One by one, the ultimate powerhouses of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect appeared, and when they saw Ye Tian appearing, they were terrified.

Ye Tian controlled his muscles at this moment to change his appearance, as well as change his breath, unless it was the arrival of the Ultimate Lord, he could see through his identity.

He also didn't want to affect Tianwei Pavilion, in fact, except for a few people in Tianwei Pavilion, no one else knew that he had broken through the Ultimate Lord Realm.

"Lord of the Ultimate, what are you trying to do when you invade our Dawn Heavenly Sect?"

An Ultimate powerhouse asked.

Boom!

Ye Tian struck casually and directly killed the other party.

Followed by.

Ye Tian went straight to the treasure house of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and the defense of the treasure house was like nothing to him.

Soon.

Ye Tian completely snatched many treasures from the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and then quickly fled.

Tear and pull!

The barrier of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth was torn apart by Ye Tian, and his body entered the Sea of Dimensions.

As soon as he entered the Dimensional Sea, he found it difficult to control this body.

He knew the reason, because he was able to descend to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and it was the Void Heaven Roulette of the Void Heaven Palace that allowed him to descend to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, but it was limited to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

And now that he is out of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, it is equivalent to being out of the range of the Void Heaven Roulette, and it will be difficult to control this body.

However, his purpose has been achieved.

Wow!

His true body copy body arrived, took all the treasures of Yang Wu's body, and then completely annihilated this ultimate lord body, leaving no evidence.

And at this moment, he sensed streams of light coming across the sea of dimensions.

"The Five Ultimate Lords!"

Ye Tian immediately fled.

These five Ultimate Masters are not the strength of Yang Wu's body, they not only have the body of the Ultimate Lord, but also have taken other paths, far from being comparable to the new Ultimate Lord, they are truly comparable to the existence of the Void Immortal Realm.

Maybe they didn't have to get Ye Tian, but Ye Tian didn't dare to be entangled by them, otherwise it would be a trivial matter for the duplicate body to be killed, and if these treasures were gone, it would be bad.

"Heavenly Extreme Killing Move, Escape!"

Ye Tian quickly shuttled through the sea of dimensions, hurried with the Heavenly Extreme Killing Move, and with the blessing of the supreme dimensional rules, his speed was much faster than that of the ordinary Ultimate Lord.

Those Ultimate Lords were still a little slower, and they couldn't catch up with Ye Tian.

And not long after, Ye Tian's other replica bodies interfered with the tracking and scattered to escape, even if a more powerful Ultimate Lord arrived, they would not be able to lock the replica body that had the treasure.

......

God Dimension Heaven and Earth.

Yao Ri Heavenly Sect.

An Ultimate Lord descended, and at this moment, they looked at the destruction of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and their hearts were extremely angry.

"Damn, who the hell is it?"

They knew very well that after the powerhouses of the outside world entered the Shenwei Heaven and Earth, they could not exert their strength at all, and the Shenwei Heaven and Earth only allowed the existence of the power of the Shenwei.

Even after the means and energy systems they mastered in the outside world entered the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, they were suppressed so much that they could not reveal the slightest breath.

An Ultimate Perfection powerhouse immediately said: "Fellow Ancestors, it is a new Ultimate Lord of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and we didn't expect that this new Ultimate Lord did not stabilize the realm at the first time after breaking through, but came to attack our Yao Sun Heavenly Sect. "

"Just now, we tracked down a strong man, but that strong man is not the ultimate master of our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, the other party has a powerful cultivation path, is the ninth realm peak existence of the Dimensional Sea, and has the ultimate body and the ultimate dimensional killing move. And the new ultimate lord is not there, and the other party's purpose is very clear, which is to snatch the treasure of our Yao Sun Heavenly Sect. "

"Now it can be roughly judged that the new lord should be the consciousness of an outsider to occupy his body and practice, and come to our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth to master the ultimate dimensional killing moves. "

"Damn these outsiders, I'm going to kill them sooner rather than later!"

"It's a pity that our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth did not give birth to an Ultimate Realm Lord, otherwise how would these outsiders dare to come to our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth at will!"

These ultimate lords of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect roared angrily.
